TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Angcoh == Itiniay i Posko Siang no Hualien ko Angcoh a niyaro', 64 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 154 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 148 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 95%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko ongsing i niyaro', angcoh a masanek kora nanom, faedet aca a tifingen. I ka'orip no mato'asay i tiyaho, 'alomaloman ko tamdaw no niyaroyaro' tayni a micefongay i angcohay a nanom, mi'adah ko malalisanay , ko makodicay , ato masamaamaanay a adada no fages. Ira ko katelangay a lalan nani Pakara'ac ato nani Kinanoka tayra i 'Angcoh. Anini, mapalalan to faelohay i Posko—Kakacawan . Talihafan
S.PHON: == aŋʦo~uħ == itiniaj i po~usko~u siaŋ no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u aŋʦo~uħ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u o~uŋsiŋ i nijaro~uʡ, aŋʦo~uħ a masanək ko~ura nano~um, faəɬ~ɮət aʦa a tifiŋən. i kaʡo~urip no~u mato~uʡasaj i tijaħo~u, ʡaɾo~umaɾo~uman ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~ujaro~uʡ tajni a miʦəfo~uŋaj i aŋʦo~uħaj a nano~um, miʡaɬ~ɮaħ ko~u maɾaɾisanaj , ko~u mako~uɬ~ɮiʦaj , ato~u masamaamaanaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u fa*əs. ira ko~u katəɾaŋaj a ɾaɾan nani pakaraʡaʦ ato~u nani kinano~uka tajra i ʡaŋʦo~uħ. anini, mapaɾaɾan to~u faəɾo~uħaj i po~usko~u*kakaʦawan . taɾiħafan
S.FORM: == Angcoh == Itiniay i Posko Siang no Hualien ko Angcoh a niyaro', 64 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 154 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 96% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 148 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 4% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 6 ko tamdaw. O pasinto no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko 'Amis 95%, Bunun 1%. Ira ko ongsing i niyaro', angcoh a masanek kora nanom, faedet aca a tifingen. I ka'orip no mato'asay i tiyaho, 'alomaloman ko tamdaw no niyaroyaro' tayni a micefongay i angcohay a nanom, mi'adah ko malalisanay , ko makodicay , ato masamaamaanay a adada no fages. Ira ko katelangay a lalan nani Pakara'ac ato nani Kinanoka tayra i 'Angcoh. Anini, mapalalan to faelohay i Posko—Kakacawan . Talihafan
S.PHON: == aŋʦo~uħ == itiniaj i po~usko~u siaŋ no~u ħo~u~uaɾiən ko~u aŋʦo~uħ a nijaro~uʡ, ** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, * ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pasinto~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u ʡamis **%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un *%. ira ko~u o~uŋsiŋ i nijaro~uʡ, aŋʦo~uħ a masanək ko~ura nano~um, faəɬ~ɮət aʦa a tifiŋən. i kaʡo~urip no~u mato~uʡasaj i tijaħo~u, ʡaɾo~umaɾo~uman ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u nijaro~ujaro~uʡ tajni a miʦəfo~uŋaj i aŋʦo~uħaj a nano~um, miʡaɬ~ɮaħ ko~u maɾaɾisanaj , ko~u mako~uɬ~ɮiʦaj , ato~u masamaamaanaj a aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa no~u fa*əs. ira ko~u katəɾaŋaj a ɾaɾan nani pakaraʡaʦ ato~u nani kinano~uka tajra i ʡaŋʦo~uħ. anini, mapaɾaɾan to~u faəɾo~uħaj i po~usko~u*kakaʦawan . taɾiħafan
